# Kesher PR Review Contract

## What changed

- [fill]

## Why this change exists

- [fill]

## User flow affected

- [fill]

## Product truth preserved

- [ ] Hebrew-first with English support remains intact
- [ ] serious, respectful, verified dating remains intact
- [ ] Daily Picks + Explore remain intact
- [ ] Hard / Soft / Learned model remains intact
- [ ] visible trust system remains intact
- [ ] premium calm remains intact

## Red-line check

- [ ] no attractiveness scoring
- [ ] no hot-or-not mechanics
- [ ] no anonymous random chat
- [ ] no AI impersonation or auto-send
- [ ] no protected-trait photo inference
- [ ] no hidden ranking or filter manipulation
- [ ] no client-side secrets
- [ ] no uncontrolled production writes

## Scope check

- [ ] no unrelated refactor creep
- [ ] no hidden auth or permission changes
- [ ] no unreviewed moderation consequence changes
- [ ] no risky schema migration without approval

## Files changed

- [fill]

## Validation run

- [ ] tests
- [ ] typecheck
- [ ] lint
- [ ] build
- [ ] changed flow verified
- [ ] security or privacy review as needed

## Contract checks

- [ ] schema and UI contract still align
- [ ] server boundary validation exists or is preserved
- [ ] disclosures and user control remain intact where relevant
- [ ] feature registry and policy layer remain aligned where relevant

## Risks or unknowns

- [fill]

## Needs human review from

- [ ] product
- [ ] engineering
- [ ] trust and safety
- [ ] policy or privacy
